name_en: The bucket bag is a signature style for many fashion bloggers, suitable for both commuting and casual wear. Canvas material is structured and durable, creating a more three-dimensional silhouette when worn. It offers ample capacity and an adjustable shoulder strap! Plus, it's very lightweight. As a new member of this series, it's bound to captivate many bag lovers!
